name: Bubble Crash
desc: This card can only be activated when any player has 6 or more cards on the field and/or in their hand. The player(s) then select and send cards to their respective Graveyards until the amount remaining on the field and in their hand is 5.
eff: This card can only be activated when any player has 6 or more cards on the field and/or in their hand. The player(s) then select and send cards to their respective Graveyards until the amount remaining on the field and in their hand is 5.

action: Makes the player send from the hand to the Graveyard
Makes the player send from the field to the Graveyard
Makes your opponent send from the hand to the Graveyard
Makes your opponent send from the field to the Graveyard
